title: Browse trending tags and suggested users on the explore page

acceptance_criteria.title: Explore page shows trending tags and user list
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to the explore page
When the page loads
Then I see a list of trending tags and a list of suggested users

title: Click a tag on the explore page to filter posts

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking a tag filters the visible posts to that tag
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the explore page
When I click on a trending tag
Then I see only posts tagged with that tag

title: View the home feed with posts and author info

acceptance_criteria.title: Home feed shows posts with author info and engagement counts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home page
When the page loads
Then I see a list of posts with author names, handles, and engagement counts

acceptance_criteria.title: Meta banner is visible on home page
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home page
When the page loads
Then I see the meta banner explaining the demo origin

title: Like and bookmark posts on the home feed

acceptance_criteria.title: Like button toggles visual state and updates count
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am viewing the home feed
When I click the like button on a post
Then the like button becomes active and the count increases by 1

acceptance_criteria.title: Bookmark button toggles visual state
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am viewing the home feed
When I click the bookmark button on a post
Then the bookmark button becomes active

title: Compose and submit a new post from the home feed

acceptance_criteria.title: Valid post submission adds post to feed
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am viewing the home feed
When I write a post in the composer and submit
Then the post appears at the top of the feed

acceptance_criteria.title: Empty post submission shows validation error
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am viewing the home feed
When I try to submit the composer with empty content
Then I see a validation error and no post is created

title: Toggle between dark and light theme

acceptance_criteria.title: Theme toggle button exists in the navigation
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on any page
When the page loads
Then I see a theme toggle button in the navigation

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking theme toggle switches the theme class
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home page in light mode
When I click the theme toggle
Then the dark class is applied to the HTML element

title: See the meta banner explaining the demo origin on every page

acceptance_criteria.title: Meta banner is visible on the home page
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home page
When the page loads
Then I see the meta banner with links to the seed and spec

acceptance_criteria.title: Meta banner is visible on the explore page
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the explore page
When the page loads
Then I see the meta banner

acceptance_criteria.title: Meta banner is visible on the search page
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the search page
When the page loads
Then I see the meta banner

title: View a user profile with their posts and stats

acceptance_criteria.title: Profile page shows user info and posts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to a user profile page
When the page loads
Then I see the user display name, handle, bio, and follower counts

acceptance_criteria.title: Unknown profile handle shows not-found message
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to a profile that does not exist
When the page loads
Then I see a not-found message

title: Follow and unfollow a user from their profile page

acceptance_criteria.title: Follow button toggles to Unfollow after clicking
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am viewing a user profile
When I click the Follow button
Then the button changes to show Unfollow

acceptance_criteria.title: Unfollow button toggles back to Follow after clicking
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am viewing a user profile and already following them
When I click the Unfollow button
Then the button changes back to Follow

title: Search posts by keyword and see filtered results

acceptance_criteria.title: Typing a query shows matching posts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the search page
When I type a keyword that appears in a post
Then I see posts containing that keyword in the results

acceptance_criteria.title: No matching results shows empty state message
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the search page
When I type a query that matches no posts
Then I see a no-results message

acceptance_criteria.title: Empty query shows no results
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the search page
When the input is empty
Then no posts are shown

title: View a single post with its replies

acceptance_criteria.title: Post detail page shows the post content and author
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to a post detail page
When the page loads
Then I see the post content and author information

acceptance_criteria.title: Invalid post ID shows not-found message
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to a post that does not exist
When the page loads
Then I see a not-found message
